purpose: Comprehensive catalog of every IPC channel in the Electron app: 26 push channels (main → renderer) and roughly 140 pull handlers (renderer → main) grouped by 17+ feature domains (dashboard, claude, git, ide, debug, terminal, conversations, swarm, settings, etc.). Defines payload shapes and triggering conditions.
gotchas: Push channels are whitelisted in preload.js — adding a channel requires editing both sides
Pull handlers always return { success, data?, error? } — renderer must check success
Dashboard-scoped events include dashboardId; global events do not
patterns: ipcRenderer.invoke for request/response, ipcRenderer.on for push
Whitelisted channels in contextBridge for security
conventions: Push channel names: snake_case domain-led (agent_progress, ide-file-change)
Pull handler names: kebab-case action-led (git-status, ide-read-file)
